channel.title: Widget on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Widget on Arrans github.io

item.title: flyerhq/flutter_chat_ui
item.description: Free and open-source chat SDK. Build fast, real-time apps and generative AI agents with a high-performance, customizable, cross-platform UI.

item.title: gonuit/flutter-custom-refresh-indicator
item.description: Widget that makes it easy to implement a custom pull to refresh gesture.

item.title: oi-narendra/multiselect-dropdown
item.description: Streamlined Flutter widget for versatile multi-selection with extensive customization.

item.title: JunoNgx/kde-currently-playing
item.description: A minimal media info widget for KDE Plasma
